decisions.rationale: Observation already maps to its own base_record_id route_m15-local-limited, which is the canonical M15 Limited record. The record already aliases route_m15-limited-2010-01-14 and lists 2010_01_14_brt_1st2nd_cac3 as a source. Evidence p014_c0004 confirms 'Sources of delay on M15 Limited' matches this route variant. do_not_merge_pairs confirms route_m15-local-limited ≠ route_m15-sbs.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Sources of delay on M15 Limited
A pie chart titled "Sources of delay on M15 Limited" showing the distribution of delay sources.

decisions.rationale: Observation already maps to its own base_record_id route_bx12-plus, which is the canonical BX12 SBS record. The record already aliases route_bx12-sbs-2010-01-14 and lists 2010_01_14_brt_1st2nd_cac3 as a source. Block p016_c0011 shows a BX12 SBS bus; page heading p016_c0002 labels it 'Fordham Road Select Bus Service'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A photograph of a New York City Select Bus Service (SBS) bus, route BX12, stopped at a curbside bus lane. The bus is white with blue and light blue accents, featuring the 'selectbusservice' logo. The destination sign displays 'BX12 BAY PLAZA CO-OP CITY'.

proposed_relations.description: route_fordham-pelham-pkwy-sbs describes Fordham Road-Pelham Parkway Select Bus Service, which is the BX12 SBS route. Source p016 uses 'Fordham Road Select Bus Service' as the heading for a page whose photo (p016_c0011) clearly depicts a BX12 SBS bus, confirming the identity.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A photograph of a New York City Select Bus Service (SBS) bus, route BX12, stopped at a curbside bus lane. The bus is white with blue and light blue accents, featuring the 'selectbusservice' logo. The destination sign displays 'BX12 BAY PLAZA CO-OP CITY'.
